zh.Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾格利姆斯索普
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter Greystoke於1108年出生在英國英格蘭波藍德格斯托可時，他的父親Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke29歲，母親Agnes FitzWalter25歲。他和Beatrice de Folketon至少有6個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1162年在英國波藍德格斯托可享年55歲。

zh-hans.Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾格利姆斯索普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter Greystoke于1108年出生在英国英格兰波藍德格斯托可时，他的父亲Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke29岁，母亲Agnes FitzWalter25岁。他和Beatrice de Folketon至少有6个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1162年在英国波藍德格斯托可享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Greystoke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Graystock
meanings: English: locative name, from Greystoke (Cumb), recorded as Graystock in 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter Greystoke was born in 1108, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke, was 29 and his mother, Agnes FitzWalter, was 25. He had at least 6 sons and 1 daughter with Beatrice de Folketon. He died about 1162, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter Greystoke est né en 1108, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes FitzWalter, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille avec Beatrice de Folketon. Il est décédé environ 1162, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter Greystoke 1108 in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke 29 und seine Mutter Agnes FitzWalter 25. Er hatte mit Beatrice de Folketon mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1162 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Greystoke, Cumberland, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Greystoke è nato il nel 1108 nel Greystoke, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Agnes FitzWalter, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia con Beatrice de Folketon. Morì circa 1162, nel Greystoke, Cumberland, England, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.Grimsthorpe, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイアグリムスソルペ
ja.Greystoke, Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランドグレイストク
ja.Somme, Picardie, France: フランスピカーディソンメ
ja.Grimethorpe, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアグリメソルペ
ja.lifeSummary: Walter Greystokeが1108年にイギリスイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクで生まれた時，父Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystokeは29歳，母Agnes FitzWalterは25歳であった。彼はBeatrice de Folketonとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1162年にイギリスクウンバーランドグレイストクで55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter Greystoke(이)가 1108년 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드 그리스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes FitzWalter(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Beatrice de Folketon(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1162년 영국 쿠벌랜드 그리스토크에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter Greystoke nasceu em 1108, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes FitzWalter, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha com Beatrice de Folketon. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1162, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter Greystoke родился в 1108 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes FitzWalter, 25. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь от Beatrice de Folketon. Он умер около 1162 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter Greystoke nació en 1108, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ives FitzForne 3rd Baron of Greystoke, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes FitzWalter, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija con Beatrice de Folketon. Murió aproximadamente 1162, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 55 años.
